title: Soldier, Scholar and Symbol: Marc Bloch Is Elevated to France’s Panthéon
summary_full: French politicians, including those on the far right, are embracing a Jewish Resistance fighter murdered by the Gestapo in 1944.
summary_public: French politicians, including those on the far right, are embracing a Jewish Resistance fighter murdered by the Gestapo in 1944.
